Plesir Suites Radio
We're just a group of people who love good music and our local scene. We want to keep Plesir Suites as a free space for everyone to explore new sounds, but we can't do it alone. By supporting us, you're helping keep the broadcast crisp and we keep the sounds on.
Live on our leisure days.
Plesir Suites Radio
Your neighborhood's independent web radio. A collective space for diverse sounds and community broadcasts, emerging as a digital hangout for internet friends.
Built by the Neighborhood, for the Neighborhood.
